config.title: Lista okien
config.script:
#include "50120" #include "50125" #include "50203"
dim iCounter : iCounter = 7 + 8 * 5
function load_list() dim pagestack dim tab: set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(100)).removeall with tab.newrow.newcell.cell .backcolor = rgb(255,255,255) end with tab.addtext "Lista stron" tab.element.bold=true for each pagestack in doc_ if not pagestack.gettoppage is nothing then tab.newrow tab.newcell.addtexthli pagestack.gettoppage.topelement.title , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='activatePage' vn100=" + CStr(pagestack.gettoppage.iid) ) tab.element.width=CLng( MAXIMIZE_SIZE ) end if next tab.newrow.newcell.addtext " " with tab.newrow.newcell.cell .backcolor = rgb(255,255,255) end with tab.addtexthli "Więcej...", doc_.createhlistr("varFunction='showmore'") ' tab.element.forecolor = rgb(255,0,0) tab.element.bold=true exit function
load_list=true end function
function showmore() dim tab: set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(100)).removeall '-- additional info
tab.newrow.newcell.addtext "Bieżące parametry" tab.cell.colspan = 2
tab.element.bold=true
with tab.newrow.newcell.cell .colspan = 2 .backcolor = rgb(255,255,255) end with tab.addtext "Bieżąca data: " + doc_.afc.display.fulldate(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))
if not getCurrentFirma() is nothing then with tab.newrow.newcell.cell .colspan = 2 .backcolor = rgb(255,255,255) end with tab.addtext "Bieżąca firma: " + getCurrentFirma().text end if
dim strCurrentUser : strCurrentUser = ""
if not getCurrentUser() is nothing then strCurrentUser = GetCurrentUserName() end if
if strCurrentUser <> "" then with tab.newrow.newcell.cell .colspan = 2 .backcolor = rgb(255,255,255) end with tab.addtext "Bieżący użytkownik: " + strCurrentUser end if
if not getCurrentRKS() is nothing then with tab.newrow.newcell.cell .colspan = 2 .backcolor = rgb(255,255,255) end with tab.addtext "Bieżący rok księgowy: " + getCurrentRKS().text end if
tab.newrow.newcell.addtext "Użyte licencje:" tab.cell.colspan = 2 tab.element.bold=true
dim pM60106 : set pM60106 = doc_.getmodule(60106) dim iter : iter = 0 dim iCookie dim strUserName,strCompName iCookie = doc_.getusers(iter, strCompName, strUserName) do while iCookie <> 0 with tab.newrow.newcell.cell .backcolor = rgb(255,255,255) end with
dim strLogonName if doc_.getuserprop(iCookie, NETWORK_USERPROP_NAME, strLogonName) then strUserName = strLogonName + " (" + strUserName + ")" end if
tab.addtext strUserName + " z " + strCompName + "" tab.newcell tab.cell.backcolor = rgb(255,255,255) dim iLicInfo : iLicInfo = clng(0) if doc_.getuserprop(iCookie, NETWORK_USERPROP_LICMASK, iLicInfo) then tab.addtext pM60106.LicModuleNameEx(iLicInfo,", ") end if
iter = iter + 1 iCookie = doc_.getusers(iter, strCompName, strUserName) loop end function
function activatePage(byref pHli) doc_.postcommand("varCmd=CMD_INTERNAL_ACTIVATE gvar_page_iid=" + CStr(pHli.prop(100)) ) page_.goback end function
function fopen() : fopen = false dim pPage : set pPage = doc_.getmodule(12).find_page_on_iid(THIS_FILE) if pPage is nothing then load_list fopen = true else pPage.activate pPage.load_list end if set_timer end function
function fclose kill_timer end function
function frefresh load_list end function
function update_color(byref oHLI) dim iColor : iColor = iCounter mod 8 if iColor = 0 then showmore end if page_.topelement.backcolor = clng(clng(7-iColor) * clng(&H10000000) + page_.topelement.backcolor) page_.topelement.backcolor2 = clng((7-iColor) * clng(&H10000000) + page_.topelement.backcolor2) page_.updateview iCounter = iCounter - 1 if iCounter = 0 then page_.goback end if end function
private function set_timer doc_.timer 1215,"varFunctionHLI='update_color' gvar_page_iid='" + CStr(page_.iid) + "'",1 end function
private function kill_timer doc_.timer 1215,"",0 end function
